headline: Cincinnati Financial Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher Premiums
summary: CINF's Q1 results swing to profit as premiums and net investment income growth boost earnings, alongside improved underwriting and lower losses.

headline: Brown & Brown Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Higher Commissions
summary: BRO Q1 earnings beat estimates as higher commissions, investment income and EBITDAC drive growth, despite flat organic revenues and rising expenses.

headline: Travelers: Not Exciting, Just Reliable
summary: Travelers Q1 2026: strong underwriting (88.6% combined ratio), 13.5% dividend hike, and $1.8B buybacks. Click here to read this latest analysis of TRV stock.

headline: How The Travelers Companies (TRV) Narrative Is Shifting With New Targets And Reserve Debates
summary: The updated fair value estimate for Travelers Companies has shifted from US$307.18 to US$313.64 per share, putting a fresh spotlight on where analysts think the shares should trade. That move sits against a backdrop of Street research in which several firms have raised price targets by double digit amounts, while at least one has trimmed its view. All are reacting to debates around reserves, underwriting quality and margin durability. Read on to see what is driving the split in opinion and...
